title: Grilled Malaysian-Style Skewers
description: Delicious and easy-to-make skewers featuring marinated chicken, served with a side of pickled water chestnuts. Perfect for a summer evening.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together coconut oil, cumin, coriander, garlic powder, and 1/4 cup of the peanut sauce. Add the chicken and marinate for at least 30 minutes, or up to 2 hours in the refrigerator.
Thread the marinated chicken, pickled water chestnuts, and chopped cilantro onto the skewers.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, or until the chicken is cooked through and the vegetables are tender.
Brush the skewers with the remaining peanut sauce during the last minute of grilling.
Serve hot with additional peanut sauce for serving, if desired.
